name: Sloppy Franks
recipeIngredient: 1 each Small Onion, Chopped              1/2 cup  Chopped Green Pepper
1 tablespoon Butter Or Margarine               1/2 cup  Barbecue sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and microwave onion, green pepper, and margarine in a 1-quart casserole on high (100%) until vegetables are tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
2. Stir in barbecue sauce, catsup, and frankfurters. Cover and microwave on high (100%), for 2 1/2 minutes, stirring.
3. Cover and microwave until mixture boils, for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Spoon mixture onto buns on serving plate. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until buns are hot, for 1 to 2 minutes.
